data.title: Hawthorn Resources Acquires Prince Silver Deposit in Nevada
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Hawthorn Resources Corp. ( (TSE:HWTN) ) has provided an update.

Hawthorn Resources Corp. has entered into a binding agreement to acquire Stampede Metals Corporation, which holds the Prince Silver and Stampede Gap projects in Nevada. This acquisition aims to advance the Prince Silver Project, a near-surface silver-gold-zinc deposit with historical production, by initiating a drilling program to achieve significant resource milestones, potentially impacting their market positioning and growth in the mining sector.

More about Hawthorn Resources Corp.

Hawthorn Resources Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties. The company is primarily involved in projects related to silver, gold, zinc, and other precious metals.

YTD Price Performance: 21.43%

Average Trading Volume: 17,588

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

data.title: Flowers Foods Acquires Purposeful Foods for $795 Million
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Flowers Foods ( (FLO) ) just unveiled an update.

On February 14, 2025, C. Martin Wood III announced his decision to retire from the board of directors of Flowers Foods at the end of his current term, coinciding with the company’s 2025 annual meeting of shareholders. This decision will result in a reduction of the board’s size from 12 to 11 members. Additionally, on February 21, 2025, Flowers Foods completed the acquisition of Purposeful Foods Holdings, Inc., the parent company of Simple Mills, for $795 million. This acquisition aims to enhance Flowers Foods’ presence in the better-for-you and snacking segments, diversifying its category exposure and improving growth and margin prospects.

More about Flowers Foods

Flowers Foods, Inc., headquartered in Thomasville, Georgia, is one of the largest producers of packaged bakery foods in the United States, with 2024 net sales of $5.1 billion. The company operates bakeries across the country producing a wide range of bakery products, with top brands including Nature’s Own, Dave’s Killer Bread, Wonder, Canyon Bakehouse, and Tastykake.

YTD Price Performance: -7.20%

Average Trading Volume: 1,843,362

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $4.02B

Andrada Mining ( (GB:ATM) ) has issued an update.

Andrada Mining Limited has updated its employee incentive scheme, offering employees the choice between cash bonuses and shares, and has issued a significant number of ordinary shares. This move reflects the company’s strategic focus on cash preservation while aligning employee interests with company performance. The issuance of shares is part of a broader incentive plan, including long-term and employee share schemes, designed to retain key talent and ensure alignment with shareholder value creation.

More about Andrada Mining

Andrada Mining Limited, listed on the London Stock Exchange, New York, and Namibia Stock Exchange, focuses on producing critical raw materials such as tin, lithium, tungsten, tantalum, and copper from its mining assets in Namibia. The company aims to become a leading African producer of these essential metals, which are crucial for the green energy transition.

data.title: DCI Advisors Sells Stake in Cypriot Developers Aristo and Venus Rock
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An announcement from Dolphin Capital Investors ( (GB:DCI) ) is now available.

DCI Advisors Ltd has announced the sale of its 47.93% holding in DCI Holdings Two Limited, which owns Aristo Developers in Cyprus, to the majority shareholder, Mr. Theodoros Aristodemou, for €27.6 million. The transaction includes cash payments and the transfer of development land, with DCI planning to market the land for sale. Additionally, Mr. Aristodemou will make a final payment of €3.5 million for DCI’s remaining stake in Venus Rock, achieving his full ownership of both companies. This divestment enables DCI to align with its strategy of selling assets, potentially impacting its market focus.

More about Dolphin Capital Investors

DCI Advisors Ltd is a company involved in the real estate industry, focusing on the development and sale of residential properties. The company has a significant market presence in Cyprus through its holdings in prominent property developers such as Aristo Developers Limited and Venus Rock Estates Limited.

Average Trading Volume: 825,395

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

data.title: EdgeLab Enhances Marine Heritage Protection with U_Tracker® Delivery
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

EdgeLab S.p.A. ( (IT:ELB) ) has shared an update.

EdgeLab S.p.A. has delivered its Autonomous Underwater Vehicle, U_Tracker®, to the Superintendency of the Sea of the Sicilian Region after completing operator training. This collaboration enhances the use of AUVs in scientific and cultural fields, allowing for improved monitoring of marine heritage and strengthening ties between research and technological innovation. The initiative underscores EdgeLab’s dedication to advancing marine technology and expanding its influence in the sector.

More about EdgeLab S.p.A.

EdgeLab S.p.A. is an innovative SME based in La Spezia, specializing in the design, development, and production of autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) and advanced robotic solutions for complex marine environments. The company operates in fields such as defense, scientific exploration, underwater archaeology, and environmental sustainability, offering cutting-edge solutions that integrate advanced engineering, artificial intelligence, and digital technologies. EdgeLab is recognized for its commitment to sustainability and innovation, collaborating with leading academic and industrial partners to advance maritime safety and ecosystem protection.

data.title: China Zenith Chemical Group Plans Non-Convertible Bond Issuance
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Xinyang Maojian Group ( (HK:0362) ) has issued an announcement.

China Zenith Chemical Group Limited has announced its intention to issue non-convertible bonds. The proposed issuance involves up to 50 bonds with a principal amount of HK$1,000,000 each, totaling no more than HK$50,000,000, bearing an interest rate of 10% per annum and maturing one year after issuance. The proceeds from these bonds are intended for debt repayment and general working capital. However, the company has not yet entered into any legally binding agreements, and the bond issuance is contingent upon formal agreements being reached. Shareholders and investors are advised to exercise caution.

More about Xinyang Maojian Group

data.title: Claros Mortgage Trust Faces GAAP Net Loss in Q4 2024
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc. ( (CMTG) ) has shared an update.

In February 2025, Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc. disclosed a financial presentation indicating a challenging financial period with a GAAP net loss of $100.7 million for the fourth quarter of 2024. Despite a decrease in their outstanding financings by $244 million during the quarter, the company’s loan portfolio remains substantial at $6.1 billion, with a focus on senior and floating-rate loans. The firm has managed to deleverage its portfolio significantly since 2023, but it faces a high percentage of loans with increased risk ratings, raising concerns for stakeholders.

More about Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc.

Claros Mortgage Trust, Inc. operates within the real estate sector, focusing on real estate equity and debt investments. It offers a diversified portfolio including multifamily, industrial, office, retail, and other asset classes. The company is involved in direct lending and property management services across the U.S., leveraging its expertise and infrastructure to target high-quality CRE assets with institutional-grade sponsorship.

YTD Price Performance: -30.88%

Average Trading Volume: 537,831

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: Coinbase Global Reaches Agreement with SEC on Litigation
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Coinbase Global ( (COIN) ) has provided an announcement.

Coinbase Global faced legal action from the SEC beginning in June 2023, with allegations of operating an unregistered securities exchange and offering unregistered securities. On February 21, 2025, Coinbase announced an agreement in principle with the SEC to dismiss the litigation, pending approval from the SEC’s Commissioners, marking a significant development in its ongoing legal challenges.

More about Coinbase Global

Coinbase Global is a leading company in the cryptocurrency industry, providing a digital asset platform and related financial services. The company facilitates buying, selling, and storing of cryptocurrencies, with a focus on enabling transactions through its digital asset platform, Prime services, and Staking services.
